summary: Verified NEW drag-and-drop UI positioning feature in Display Layout tab. All 18 HUD elements across 3 categories have drag grip handles (GripVertical icons) with proper data-testid attributes. Drag-and-drop reordering works correctly within each category. Order persists to localStorage under 'nav_hud_order' key. Reset button restores default element order. All existing features (visibility toggles, Show All/Hide All, Trip Panel Position) continue to work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: SortableRow component with drag handle using useSortable hook
VERIFIED: SortableCategory component with separate DndContext per category
VERIFIED: Drag handles have data-testid='hud-drag-{key}' for all 18 elements
VERIFIED: Drag hint text 'Drag the grip handle to reorder elements within each section' visible
VERIFIED: loadHudOrder/saveHudOrder functions in utils/hudLayout.ts for localStorage persistence
VERIFIED: Reset button resets both visibility config AND element order to defaults

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Drag-and-drop feature fully verified. Key data-testids: hud-drag-{key} for drag handles (18 total), hud-category-{navigation|panels|signs} for category sections. Order stored in localStorage under 'nav_hud_order' key. DnD uses @dnd-kit library with separate DndContext per category for independent reordering.

drag_handles_visible.details: All 18 drag handles (GripVertical icons) visible with data-testid='hud-drag-{key}'

drag_hint_text.details: Hint text 'Drag the grip handle to reorder elements within each section' is visible

drag_and_drop_reordering.details: Successfully reordered Turn Instructions and Lane Guidance in Navigation category

order_persistence_localstorage.details: Order saved to localStorage under 'nav_hud_order' key

order_persistence_navigation.details: Order persisted after navigating to Dashboard and back to Display tab

reset_restores_default_order.details: Reset button restores default element order (Turn Instructions first in Navigation)

visibility_toggles.details: Eye/EyeOff toggles work correctly, counter updates from 18/18 to 17/18

show_all_button.details: Show All sets all 18 elements visible, counter shows 18/18

hide_all_button.details: Hide All sets all 18 elements hidden, counter shows 0/18

trip_panel_position.details: LEFT/RIGHT toggle works correctly with gold background indicating active state

signs_category_elements.details: All 8 Signs elements verified: Highway Shields, Speed Limit Signs, Exit Signs, Curve Warnings, CMV Warnings, Truck Restrictions, Traffic Incidents, Waypoint Numbers
